text.title: Kubernetes LimitRange Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: set container max before admitting workloads
set defaultRequest CPU + memory greater than 0

text.example: preconditions == false -> tier_prod_max_missing == true -> default_request_missing == true -> conclusion ref.
